en: You've been on my payroll a long time. Rone, that ain't right.
ko: 넌 내 월급을 받는 지 오래야.

en: Shut up. I got one last job for you, detective.
ko: 너한테 마지막 일을 하나 맡길게, 탐정.

en: You hear me? Look, we've been all through this. Yeah?
Yeah, and I said I can't do it.
That's the wrong answer. To the table.
I'm a detective, Verone! You can do anything to me.
The whole force is gonna be on your ass in a minute. Shut your mouth.
Fat piece of shit. You can stop right now.
What the hell is it? Sit down. You regret this.
Stop right now. Once the bucket gets hot enough, detective,
the rat is gonna want out.
